DOInsurance.description:
Directors & Officers (D&O) insurance details attached to a person.

Captures whether D&O coverage is contractually required, the coverage
ceiling, and an estimate of the annual premium so that compensation
reporting can reason about total employer cost.

required.description:
Whether D&O insurance is contractually required for this person.

Field name retained for YAML compatibility; the adjacent JSON Schema
keyword `required` on object properties is unrelated.

EmploymentType.description:
Employment type enumerating the contractual relationship kinds observed
across UNSTARTER, ACME, and German-law companies modelled in CorpoSpec.

Includes the German-law specific values (`angestellte`, `geschaeftsfuehrer`,
`minijob-520`, `werkstudent`) alongside internationally common categories.

oneOf.description: Managing director of a GmbH (statutory organ under GmbHG).
German Minijob (geringfügige Beschäftigung up to €520 / month).
Fallback for contractual arrangements not covered above.

PathRef.description:
Path-based cross-reference relative to .corpospec/ root.
Pattern: `^[a-z0-9_-]+(/[a-z0-9_.-]+)+$`

PersonCustom.description:
Typed extension fields for Person.

Holds per-person payroll, insurance, and compliance metadata that does not
belong on the W3C-aligned core `Person` record. Every field is optional —
companies may omit any field not relevant to their jurisdiction.

compensation_post_pre_seed_eur.description: Annual gross compensation in EUR after the pre-seed trigger fires.

compensation_pre_pre_seed_eur.description: Annual gross compensation in EUR before the pre-seed trigger fires.

compensation_start_date.description:
Date on which compensation begins to accrue.

May differ from `Person.start_date`: a Geschäftsführer may assume the
role on day N but defer paid compensation until pre-seed close on
day N+M. When both are present, `compensation_start_date` wins for
payroll calculations.

d_o_insurance.description: Directors & Officers insurance attached to this person.

employment_contract.description:
PathRef to the legal template backing this person's contract
(e.g. `legal/templates/geschaeftsfuehrer-anstellungsvertrag`).

employment_entity.description:
PathRef to the legal entity that employs this person (e.g.
`entity/unstarter-gmbh`). Distinct from `Person.unit`, which names the
organisational unit within that entity.

health_insurance.description:
Health insurance arrangement for this person (prose; German law
distinguishes gesetzliche vs. private Krankenversicherung, with
election rules for Geschäftsführer).

rentenversicherung.description:
Statutory pension (Rentenversicherung) arrangement. Free-form prose
because values range from `pflichtig` to "voluntary (recommended for
long-term tax optimization)" with supporting reasoning.

sozialversicherung_status.description:
Statutory social-insurance (Sozialversicherung) status under German
law. Free-form because real records mix single tokens (`pflichtig`,
`exempt`) with explanatory prose citing § 7a SGB IV statusfeststellung
outcomes.

tax_residency.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the person's tax residency.

PersonName.description:
Person name.

`given` and `family` follow RFC 6350 vCard semantics. `full` is stored
explicitly rather than derived so that cultures with non-concatenative
name formats (e.g. family-name-first, particles, patronymics) can
present the preferred display form without rule-based reconstruction.

full.description: Preferred display form of the full name.

oneOf.description: Employed but temporarily away (parental leave, sabbatical, etc.).
Offer accepted but start date is in the future.

PostalAddress.description: Physical address aligned with schema.org PostalAddress.

description: Person record aligned with vCard/jCard (RFC 6350) and W3C ORG Membership.

custom.description: Typed custom extension fields (payroll, insurance, compliance).

end_date.description: Last day of employment. `null` while active.

equity.description: PathRef to this person's stakeholder record in the cap table (if any).

name.description: Person's name in RFC 6350 vCard form.

phone.description: Primary phone number in E.164-compatible form.

role.description: PathRef to the `Role` this person holds (if any).

start_date.description:
First day of employment (may precede `compensation_start_date` when
initial service is uncompensated).

type.description: W3C ORG / schema.org type discriminator. Currently always `"Person"`.

unit.description:
Organisational unit (id of an `OrgUnit` within `people/org`). This is
a local identifier, not a PathRef — the unit set is defined on
`OrgStructure.units[].id`.

title: Person
